info.english_meaning: to order to tell to explain to educate to inform to rule to command to punish
info.hindI_arTa: AjYA karanA kahanA boDa karanA aDikAra karanA SAsana karanA SAsaka honA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ' anuSizwiH niyogaH ' iti kzIrasvAmI  ' Atreya - mEtreya - svAmi - kASyapAH amumuditaM paWanti  varDamAna - sammatAkAra - haradatta - gargAdayaH anuditaM paWanti ' iti mADavaH  ' icCAyAm ASAste SAsti SAsane ' (Slo. 184) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'idaM kaviByaH pUrveByo namovAkaM praSAsmahe' (uttara॰11) praSAsmahe yAcAmahe iti yAvat namovAkam=nama ityuktvetyarTa iti kaScit atrArTe AN yujyate vaktum na hyatrArTe ANaM vyaBicarati DAtuH AN prAyika iti tu raBasoktiH yattu praSAsanaM nirdeSa iti vIrarAGavasyABimAnaH sa prayogEH samarTanAM na laBata iti nAdftyo Bavati
'praSAstf-sUta-senAnI mantryamAtya-puroDasAm' (kA॰nI॰sA॰14.45) praSAstAraH=kalADyakzA iti maNgalA praSAstAraH sEnyaprasADakA ityupADyAyanirapekzA

'ASizaSca praSizaSca saSizo viSizaSca yAH' (aTarva0 111027) saMSizaH saMSAsanAni atrAha sAyaRa upasargavaSAd DAtvarTasya Bedo'vagantavya iti hanta so'yamarTaBedastasyApi caturvedaBAzyakArasyAnavagataH
'ye cEva devAnAM SamitAro ye ca manuzyARAM tAneva tat saMSAsti' (E0 brA0 66) saMSAsanaM prezaRam
'pUzA sanyA iti sanIhArAn saMSAsti' (Apa0 SrO0 106185) saMSAsti=samprezyati saniSabdenAtra hiraRyagovastrAdIni deyadravyARyucyante sanIn harantIti sanihArAH CAndaso dIrGaH
'ASizaH praSizaSca saMSizo viSizaSca yAH' (aTarva0 111027) viSizo viviDAni SAsanAnIti sAyaRaH
'yaste BarAdanniyate cidannaM niSizat' (f0 427) niSizat nyaSizat upAharat adASat
'nU me brahmARyagne ucCaSADi' (f0 7120) utkarzeRa SoDitAni kuru
